title: Every Claude Tool Explained: Master Full Ecosystem in 20 Minutes
summary: A comprehensive tutorial covering Claude's integrated ecosystem, which includes Chat, Code, Cowork, Design, and Routines products. The video explains how these tools work together for workflows spanning research, coding, collaboration, automation, and content creation, positioning Claude as an operating system for work rather than just a chatbot.
writeup: The video walks through Claude's integrated product suite (Chat, Code, Cowork, Design, and Routines) and shows how each tool maps to a distinct stage of work: research, coding, collaboration, automation, and content creation. The framing argues Claude functions as an operating system for work rather than a standalone chatbot, with the products meant to hand off between one another across a single workflow. Supporting concepts include the Model Context Protocol, custom instructions, test-time compute, and multi-agent systems, which underpin how the tools connect and automate tasks.
